title: Decision on Protective Measures Requested by Applicants 01/04-1/dp to 01/04-6/dp
text: - […] according to rule 89, paragraph 1 of the Rules, the Prosecutor and the Defence are entitled to reply to any application for participation within the time limits set by the Pre-Trial Chamber; and that in order to place them in a position to effectively exercise this right the Registrar shall provide them a copy of any application for participation. (pp. 2-3).
keywords: rule 89.1 RoPE : participation of victims - rule 89.1 RoPE : application for participation - rule 89.1 RoPE : transmission of application for participation -ID006255
